hero.subtitle: Software Engineering graduate from Universidad de Colima and AWS certified. I work professionally with React, Next.js and TypeScript.

about.title: About
about.p1: I came to development through the influence of a family member who is also a dev, and an early fascination with technology. I studied Software Engineering at Universidad de Colima.
about.p2Before: Since early 2025 I have been working professionally in frontend (
about.p2After: ), building interfaces with Next.js, TypeScript and modern stacks. I'm a visual thinker: that's why I love seeing an interaction work as it should, an animation that feels just right, a page that loads fast.
about.p3: My next step: expanding into backend with NestJS and exploring AI. Outside of code, I'm a football fan.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together?
contact.subtitle: Always open to discussing interesting projects, job opportunities or just exchanging ideas.

footer.name: Hiram Brizuela
